role: Core type definitions and configuration contracts for the ArchSpine mirror system's protocol layer.
responsibility: Provides the foundational data model, configuration interfaces, versioning constants, and view artifact schemas that define the public API contract and enable consistent representation of mirrored code units, dependency graphs, language metadata, synchronization manifests, rule documents, and generated views.

children.role: Defines the core data contracts and configuration schema for the ArchSpine mirror system.
Public protocol facade module providing a stable entry point for importing all ArchSpine protocol types.
Type definition module establishing the contract for view artifacts in the ArchSpine view generation system.
